title: lantana horrida subsp. tiliifolia
intro: Lantana horrida subsp. tiliifolia, also known as yellow lantana, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the verbena family (Verbenaceae) and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of lantana horrida subsp. tiliifolia include treating fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
